purpose: Map the required replacement path from Strategy Knowledge previews into the old live Build From Collection system.

replacement_boundaries.current_status: unchanged; normal analysis entrypoint does not route to Strategy Knowledge live deck construction
replacement_boundaries.next_patch: v1.4.21 — Strategy Knowledge Main Pipeline Opt-In Live Bridge
replacement_boundaries.required_change: Add an explicit, guarded runtime route that can call Strategy Knowledge build outputs without breaking normal deck review.

replacement_boundaries.current_status: disabled; v1.4.19 only writes preview artifacts
replacement_boundaries.required_change: Create final deck export artifacts only after final inclusion and land write gates are satisfied.

replacement_boundaries.current_status: disabled; exact cards are candidates only and full draft is preview-only
replacement_boundaries.required_change: Promote review-only candidates into explicitly locked inclusions with clear source, role, and protection/cut rationale.

replacement_boundaries.current_status: disabled; mana base exists only as planning guidance
replacement_boundaries.next_patch: v1.4.23 — Finished Mana Base Generation Integration
replacement_boundaries.required_change: Convert mana planning bands into a finished land package while preserving basic-land availability and collection-first nonbasic rules.

replacement_boundaries.current_status: disabled; v1.4.18 previews slots but does not write lands into a deck
replacement_boundaries.required_change: Write land choices into the draft payload only after finished mana-base generation is available.

old_system_targets.role: Old commander text heuristic strategy inference / override preview.
old_system_targets.replacement: Strategy Knowledge recognition and Strategy Brain runtime selector should become the default source, while user override remains.
Strategy Knowledge role profiles and role-count target bands should become the live source.

old_system_targets.role: Old preview-only owned card role classifier.
old_system_targets.replacement: Strategy Knowledge exact-card candidates, cut/protect/replacement signals, and role-count bands should drive live classification.

old_system_targets.role: Old full 100-card draft scaffold/model with no true generation.
old_system_targets.replacement: Strategy Knowledge full draft payload should become the source for real draft output.

old_system_targets.role: Current B-E report route executor; E still routes to old full draft model/writer.
old_system_targets.replacement: Depth E should route to Strategy Knowledge live full draft construction once final inclusion and land write gates pass.

replacement_sequence: v1.4.21 — Strategy Knowledge Main Pipeline Opt-In Live Bridge
v1.4.23 — Finished Mana Base Generation Integration
v1.4.26 — Old Strategy System Deprecation / Fallback Cleanup
v1.4.27 — Full Regression / v1.4 Lock Candidate

readiness.reason: The current project has separate preview artifacts and old live Build From Collection scaffold paths. main.py and depth E output routing must be bridged deliberately.
